ai.desc: Starts with #wDevotion -> #wReach #wHeaven. Afterwards, cycles #wWallop -> #wWave #wof #wthe #wHand / #wProtect until entering #sDivinity. NL Upon entering #sDivinity, if #wReach #wHeaven was used since last entering #sDivinity, uses #wThrough #wViolence -> #wReach #wHeaven. Otherwise, uses #wReach #wHeaven. Then cycles #wWallop -> #wWave #wof #wthe #wHand / #wProtect again.
ai.notes: #uDevotion gives #uMantra every turn. Once 10 #uMantra are obtained, enters #sDivinity for the turn, dealing #rtriple #rdamage with attacks. NL #wWallop #bBlocks equal to the amount of #runblocked #rdamage dealt. NL #uWave #uof #uthe #uHand applies #dWeak to you whenever Watcher gains #bBlock that turn.
